title: Enchantment fantasy
description: More than 10 new enchantments for you!
body:
![Large logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ece86a477db0c033e7140663e0757a384177e782.png)

[![Also avaible on Curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eeff41651cddbdbb504a25c2edd0236452fcac09.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchantment-fantasy)

This mod include 10 new enchantments :

- Poison : give a poison effect to those you attack
- Life thief : get half life (in heart) from those you attck
- Invisibility : give you invisibilty effect for few seconds every time you attack
- Wealth : can spawn ore around you every time you attack
- Wealth of nether : can spawn nether ores every time you attack
- Stunning hit : paralize your ennemy for less than 1 second every time you attck
- Stifling : remove all oxygene of your opponent
- Speed : give you speed effect while you have this weapon in your mainhand
- Disturbance : inverse item in main hand of your ennemy with a random item in its hotbar
- Breaking stroke : inflict more dammage to the armorm of those you attack

Other mods by me :

[![Ore pack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d7837783178256b35b4b570561f3bb48859675c_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ore-pack)
